title: pi-gsd Settings
description: Security and allowlist configuration for the pi-gsd WXP engine. Applies at global (~/.gsd/) or project (.pi/gsd/) scope; project settings override global.

trustedPaths.description: Additional absolute paths trusted for WXP processing. Package and project harness paths are always trusted.

untrustedPaths.description: Paths that are explicitly blocked from WXP processing, even if they match a trusted path. Takes precedence over trustedPaths.

shellAllowlist.description: Additional command names (bare, no path) allowed in <shell> blocks. Extends the default allowlist: [pi-gsd-tools, git, node, cat, ls, echo, find].

shellBanlist.description: Command names explicitly blocked in <shell> blocks, even if present in shellAllowlist.

shellTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for <shell> block execution. Default: 30000 (30s).
